object.name: sendChatJoinRequestWebApp
object.description: Use this method to process a received chat join request query by showing a Mini App to the user before deciding the outcome. Call answerChatJoinRequestQuery to resolve the join request query based on the user interaction with the Mini App. Returns True on success.
object.html_description: Use this method to process a received chat join request query by showing a Mini App to the user before deciding the outcome. Call answerChatJoinRequestQuery to resolve the join request query based on the user interaction with the Mini App. Returns True on success.
object.rst_description: Use this method to process a received chat join request query by showing a Mini App to the user before deciding the outcome. Call :class:`aiogram.methods.answer_chat_join_request_query.AnswerChatJoinRequestQuery` to resolve the join request query based on the user interaction with the Mini App. Returns :code:`True` on success.

annotations.description: Unique identifier of the join request query
annotations.html_description: Unique identifier of the join request query
annotations.rst_description: Unique identifier of the join request query
annotations.name: chat_join_request_query_id

annotations.description: An HTTPS URL of a Web App to be opened with additional data as specified in Initializing Web Apps
annotations.html_description: An HTTPS URL of a Web App to be opened with additional data as specified in Initializing Web Apps
annotations.rst_description: An HTTPS URL of a Web App to be opened with additional data as specified in `Initializing Web Apps <https://core.telegram.org/bots/webapps#initializing-mini-apps>`_
annotations.name: web_app_url
